# Sidecar Advisory

> Fractional AI advisory and workflow automation for Metro Detroit small professional service firms.
> Neil Barris helps insurance agencies, law firms, accounting practices, and real estate offices
> implement practical AI with guaranteed results. Free 45-minute AI Clarity Session — or you
> walk away with a written workflow review at no charge.

## Services

- [Home / Overview](https://www.sidecaradvisory.com/): Services, pricing, and the $5,000 savings guarantee
- [Contact](https://www.sidecaradvisory.com/contact/): Book a free AI Clarity Session or send a general inquiry
- [Savings Calculator](https://www.sidecaradvisory.com/savings-calculator/): Free 90-second estimate of AI time and cost savings for your firm

## Industry Guides

- [AI for Insurance Agencies](https://www.sidecaradvisory.com/insurance-agencies/): Practical AI guide for Metro Detroit independent insurance agencies in 2026
- [AI for Law Firms](https://www.sidecaradvisory.com/law-firms/): Practical AI guide for small law firms in Metro Detroit in 2026
- [AI for Accounting Firms](https://www.sidecaradvisory.com/accounting-firms/): Practical AI guide for CPA and accounting firms in Metro Detroit in 2026
- [AI for Real Estate Offices](https://www.sidecaradvisory.com/real-estate/): Practical AI guide for real estate offices in Metro Detroit in 2026
